title: habenaria subfiliformis
intro: Habenaria subfiliformis, also known as the slender spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Habenaria subfiliformis include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. It is typically prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusions, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine in various parts of the world.
